summary: Tested Rewards/Loyalty System for Addrika e-commerce. All 15 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend RewardsSection verified working in Account page showing 55.20 coins balance. CoinRedemptionSection component is correctly integrated into CheckoutPage (shows only for shipping mode). Admin UserRewardsTab is integrated into AdminDashboard with 'User Rewards' tab navigation.

GET /api/rewards/info.details: Returns program rules: 6.9 coins per ₹125, ₹0.60 per coin redemption, 20 min coins, 50% max, 90 days validity

GET /api/rewards/balance.details: Returns user balance (55.2 coins), stats (earned/redeemed/expired), expiry info, and rules. Requires authentication (401 without).

GET /api/rewards/history.details: Returns transaction history with pagination. Requires authentication.

POST /api/rewards/max-redemption.details: Calculates max redeemable coins for cart value. For ₹500 cart: max 50% = ₹250 = 416.67 coins (or user's balance if lower).

POST /api/rewards/validate-redemption.details: Validates redemption request. Checks minimum (20), balance, and expiry. Returns is_valid, redemption_value.

GET /api/retailers/admin/user-rewards.details: Returns 403 without admin auth. Requires admin 2FA login.

POST /api/retailers/admin/user-rewards/{.details: Returns 403 without admin auth. Requires admin 2FA login.

Frontend RewardsSection.details: Account page shows: Addrika Rewards heading, coin balance (55.20), stats (Earned/Redeemed/Expired), 'How to Earn & Redeem' rules, 'View Transaction History' button with data-testid='view-rewards-history-btn'

Frontend CoinRedemptionSection.details: Component integrated in CheckoutPage.jsx (line 360). Shows only for shipping mode (!isSelfPickup). Has data-testid='coin-redemption-section', 'coins-input', 'apply-coins-btn'. Not tested via UI as fragrances page had rendering delay.

Admin UserRewardsTab.details: Tab exists at /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/UserRewardsTab.jsx. Integrated in AdminDashboard.jsx (line 3021) with tab id 'user-rewards'. Shows aggregate stats, user rewards table, adjust coins modal, and transaction history modal. Admin 2FA required for testing.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Rewards calculation logic is correct: (amount / 125) * 6.9 coins
✓ Redemption validation checks: minimum 20 coins, balance available, expiry date
✓ CoinRedemptionSection has proper data-testid attributes for testing
✓ Admin endpoints properly protected with is_admin_email() check
✓ UserRewardsTab has adjustment modal with reason field (required)
✓ Session token passed via cookies for authentication
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user test.user@example.com with 55.20 coins
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rewards system fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs: /api/rewards/info (public), /api/rewards/balance (auth), /api/rewards/history (auth), /api/rewards/max-redemption (auth), /api/rewards/validate-redemption (auth). Admin APIs require 2FA. Frontend components: RewardsSection in Account page, CoinRedemptionSection in CheckoutPage (shipping mode only), UserRewardsTab in Admin panel (user-rewards tab). Test user has 55.20 coins, expires in 89 days.
